eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Storey; Lyon; Carson City, NV; at 9:35 AM on MAY 15, 2019 Effective until 9:50 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Lyon County authorities have issued a required weekly test for Carson City, Storey, Douglas, Alpine and Lyon Counties.  This is only a test No action required
